## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on technical SEO, content, and long-term strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Canonicalization fixed:** The web agency resolved the `www` vs. non-`www` URL conflict, which was causing indexing delays. Aida will monitor Google Search Console to confirm the fix and assess its full impact.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [**Lead tracking defined:** Cresta's HubSpot-based process assigns MQLs to owners with strict SLAs (1-hr for demo requests, 8-hr for content leads). Annie will build a GA4 report to track content-driven leads.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**New AI tool demoed:** GrowthX demoed "Check," its internal AI visibility platform replacing Scrunch. It tracks Cresta and 29 competitors across \~200 prompts, using a more realistic "web search off" method for ChatGPT data.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Competitive content strategy set:** To keep guides current in a fast-moving market, GrowthX will build an Airtable automation to trigger quarterly reviews, using LLMs to check for competitor updates.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit & Fix

  - [**Problem:** New content in the "guide" section was being discovered but not indexed, a symptom of a technical issue on an established site.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Cause:** A canonicalization error where URLs incorrectly pointed to a `www` version, creating a conflict with the actual non-`www` site structure.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - **Resolution:** Cresta's web agency implemented a fix in \<24 hours. The agency is also addressing other issues (broken redirects, 404s) with a target completion of EOW next week.
  - [**Impact:** Aida will analyze Google Search Console to assess the issue's full scope and confirm the fix resolves indexing delays across the entire site.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Lead Generation & Attribution

  - [**Cresta's HubSpot Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [All forms → HubSpot for lead ingestion.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Behavior-based lead scoring triggers MQL status.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [MQLs routed to prospecting owners with strict SLAs:](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
          - [**1-hour:** Demo requests, Signal AI agent leads.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
          - [**8-hour:** Content leads.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [Missed SLAs trigger manager alerts or lead rerouting.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Attribution Need:** Aida requested reports on content-driven leads to measure the impact of both bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) and top-of-funnel (TOFU) content.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Reporting Plan:** Annie will build a GA4 report to track lead generation by page, as direct HubSpot access is not feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### "Check" AI Visibility Platform Demo

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with "Check," its new internal AI visibility platform.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Shared index of AI visibility across industries.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Tracks Cresta and 29 competitors across \~200 prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [Provides visibility and sentiment analysis for each prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [Identifies top-cited URLs to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**ChatGPT Data Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Uses a "web search off" method to simulate a typical user query, avoiding inflated visibility from citations.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Aida is confirming if the platform will also offer a "web search on" view for comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Integrations:** Planned for GA4, Search Console, Fathom, and PostHog. A Looker integration was requested.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**Access:** Cresta will gain access once the platform is ready for customers; no firm date is available.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

### Content Strategy & Updates

  - [**New Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**5 articles:** Shared for review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**3 articles:** Awaiting product team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**3 articles:** Published by Russell yesterday.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Competitive Guide Maintenance:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Problem:** Guides quickly become outdated in a fast-moving market (e.g., Sierra's new assist feature).](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will build an Airtable automation to trigger quarterly reviews for competitive guides.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Process:** The review will use LLMs to compare current competitor announcements against the guide's content and flag inconsistencies.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

      - [Schedule the image feedback session with Steve for Tuesday, 10:30 AM PT.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Publish the 3 articles awaiting product team feedback early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Tag all prompts in "Check" by persona and funnel stage.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Confirm if "Check" will offer a "web search on" view for ChatGPT data.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Connect with Netta to reschedule the weekly sync for later in the day.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [**Annie:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Build a GA4 report to track content-driven lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Russell:**](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Discuss the Phase 2 summary internally and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/X9vEoPtM3Y7CHmADfcatSkVr8Wrc8sta?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
